[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000010001 2
1 001000100 2
2 010000000 1
3 001100000 2
4 010100011 4
5 101101010 5
6 100101010 4
7 110001000 3

01 10 011000000 2
12 21 001000000 1
23 32 100101000 3
34 43 100101011 5
45 54 100101010 4 match 6
56 65 100001000 2
67 76 000001000 1
70 07 001000000 1

13 31 010000000 1 match 2
24 42 101101000 4
35 53 100101010 4 match 6
46 64 100001000 2
57 75 000001000 1
60 06 010000000 1 match 2
71 17 001000000 1

36 63 110001000 3 match 7
47 74 001001001 3
50 05 000100000 1
61 16 010000000 1 match 2
72 27 001001000 2

15 51 000000000 a
26 62 100001000 2
37 73 000001001 2
